message: Beiyi Highway climb with heavy traffic. Consider taking the train from Yilan to Taipei.
messageZh: 北宜公路：登り坂＋交通量多い。宜蘭→台北は鉄道利用も検討。

message: Heavy traffic on Beiyi Highway, especially on weekends. Narrow shoulders in some sections.
messageZh: 北宜公路：特に週末は交通量が非常に多い。路肩が狭い区間あり。

message: Urban traffic from Taipei to Taoyuan. Use designated bike lanes where available.
messageZh: 台北〜桃園：都市部の交通。自転車道を利用すること。

message: Hsinchu is known as the Windy City. Expect headwinds along the coast.
messageZh: 新竹：風の街として知られる。海沿いは向かい風に注意。

message: Moderate hills through Miaoli county.
messageZh: 苗栗県内の丘陵地帯：緩やかなアップダウン。

message: Flat plains from Changhua to Chiayi. Little shade, extreme heat in summer.
messageZh: 彰化〜嘉義：平地で日陰が少ない。夏季は猛暑に注意。

message: Hot and humid from Tainan to Kaohsiung. Hydrate frequently.
messageZh: 台南〜高雄：高温多湿。こまめな水分補給が必要。

message: Luoshanfeng (falling mountain wind) zone. Strong crosswinds Oct-Apr can reach 60+ km/h.
messageZh: 楓港〜車城：落山風エリア。10〜4月は60km/h超の横風に注意。

message: Short tunnels along the southern coast. Use rear lights.
messageZh: 南部海岸のトンネル：後方ライト必須。

message: Shouqia Pass: 460m elevation gain over 17km. The hardest climb on the route. Carry extra water.
messageZh: 寿卡：17kmで標高差約460m。環島最大の難所。水を多めに携帯すること。

message: Very limited supply between Manzhou and Daren. Stock up before the climb.
messageZh: 滿州〜達仁：補給ポイントが極めて少ない。登り前に必ず補給。

message: Dark rural roads from Daren to Taitung. Plan to pass in daylight.
messageZh: 達仁〜台東：夜間は暗い田舎道。明るいうちに通過すること。

message: Supply stops are sparse on the East Coast (Taitung to Hualien). Plan ahead.
messageZh: 台東〜花蓮海線：補給地点が少ない。計画的な補給が必要。

message: Pacific coast exposure. Headwinds possible when cycling north.
messageZh: 東海岸：太平洋に面し、北上時は向かい風の可能性。

message: Suhua Highway: Extremely dangerous for cyclists. Heavy truck traffic, narrow roads, landslide risk.
messageZh: 蘇花公路：自転車にとって極めて危険。大型車多数、道幅狭い、落石リスク。

message: Multiple long tunnels on Suhua Highway. Poor ventilation, no bike lane. Very dangerous.
messageZh: 蘇花公路のトンネル群：換気不良、自転車レーンなし。非常に危険。

message: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: Take the train from Xincheng/Hualien to Su'ao. Much safer than cycling Suhua Highway.
messageZh: 【強く推奨】新城/花蓮→蘇澳は鉄道輸送を推奨。蘇花公路の自転車走行は極めて危険。

message: Steep climbs on Suhua Highway with exposed cliff roads.
messageZh: 蘇花公路：急な登り坂と崖沿いの道路。

message: Moderate traffic along the northeast coast, especially on weekends.
messageZh: 北東海岸：特に週末は交通量多め。

message: Xiluo Bridge: Narrow bridge with traffic. Use caution when crossing.
messageZh: 西螺大橋：狭い橋の上で交通あり。注意して渡ること。
